Sound Familiar?

You are not the problem. The approach was.

01

You’re a high performer. Whether you run a business or lead a team, you show up at a high level every single day. You are the person people rely on. But when you look in the mirror, the person staring back doesn’t reflect any of that.

02

You’ve been going to the gym 4–5 days a week. You’ve done the bootcamps. You’ve been putting in the effort and still nothing is changing.

03

You’ve done keto, carnivore, fasting, low carb. You lose a bit, feel terrible, stop, and put it all back on and then some. Every restart leaves you further behind than the one before.

04

Every trip you take resets whatever progress you made. You come back heavier, frustrated, and telling yourself you’ll start again on Monday.

05

You decline the beach trip. You wear the shirt that hides it. You skip photos or hide behind people to cover yourself. The gap between who you know you are and what you actually look like follows you everywhere.

None of this is a willpower problem. It’s a system problem. And systems can be fixed.

Here’s Why Nothing Worked

Why it hasn’t worked and why nobody’s been honest with you about it.

Here’s why motivation was never going to be enough

You showed up when you felt like it and skipped when you didn’t. Some weeks were perfect. Others fell apart completely. That’s not a character flaw. That’s what happens when motivation is your only strategy. Motivation is a feeling. It comes and goes. A system doesn’t.

Here’s why showing up to the gym isn’t enough

Monday: chest. Tuesday: arms. Wednesday: cardio for 45 minutes because you heard it burns fat. No progressive overload. No periodization. No structure. Just movement without direction, and wondering why nothing’s changing.

Here’s why the diet you copied from someone else didn’t work

Keto because your coworker lost 20 pounds. Carnivore because a podcast said so. Fasting because it worked for everyone. None of it was designed for your body, your schedule, or your actual goals. So it worked for two weeks, then it didn’t.

Here’s why your trainer wasn’t helping you

You paid someone good money and what you got was a text message with your workouts and a list of what to eat, and maybe a Google check-in sheet. Nothing based on real data. No real assessment of where you were starting, what your body actually needed, or how your life works. The plan was generic and not built for you. You showed up, you sweated, and you stayed the same.

Here’s why the ChatGPT plan didn’t stick

You asked AI to write you a program. It gave you something generic. No one checked your form. No one adjusted it when life got busy. No one told you the plan was wrong for your training level. No one kept you accountable. You followed it for a week and a half.

Every single one of these fails for the same reason: they weren’t built for YOU. Your schedule. Your starting point. Your actual life. That’s what AEM fixes.

How It Works

Here’s why AEM works when everything else didn’t.

Every client goes through the same three-phase process. It starts with understanding before it starts with action.

A
E
M
A — Audit

Finally understand why nothing has worked until now.

Most programs skip this entirely. They hand you a plan before they understand your life. The Audit exists because the right system cannot be built without the right information. Before anything is prescribed, we go deep. Training history, nutrition habits, sleep, stress, routine patterns, movement, and physical capacity. The result is a complete picture of where you are, why previous attempts failed, and exactly what needs to be different this time.

E — Engineer

Your complete system, built for your actual life.

Most plans are built for an ideal version of your life that does not exist. The Engineer phase builds your system around the life you actually have. Training, nutrition, and daily habits, all designed from the data collected in the Audit. Structured into a yearly roadmap with quarterly phases, monthly targets, and daily actions. Nothing is generic. Nothing is guesswork. Everything has a reason.

M — Mobilize

Become the person you have always known you were capable of being.

Execution without coaching is where most people fall apart. The Mobilize phase is where you execute the system with a coach in your corner every step of the way. Progress is tracked, patterns are broken, and the system is continuously refined as you grow. Results do not come from a plan sitting in an app. They come from someone making sure you stay on track, adjusting what needs adjusting, and pushing you forward when progress feels slow.

I take on a maximum of 20 clients at a time to make sure every client gets the coaching quality they deserve.

Here’s Everything You Get

Everything you need to transform. Nothing you don’t.

Data-driven coaching built around your actual life. Never guesswork.

01

A complete system built entirely around you

Training, nutrition, and daily routines working together as one plan. Not three separate things. One system built from the data collected in your Audit, designed around your schedule, your goals, your food preferences, and your life. This is what makes results stick long term.

Progressive trainingExact nutrition targetsHabit optimization
02

A coach who stays in it with you

Throughout the week you have direct access to me through messaging, voice notes, and video messages. I review your numbers, answer your questions, and adjust your plan based on what the data is showing. Every question gets answered by me personally. Nothing gets left to guesswork.

Video coaching callsDirect accessReal-time adjustments
03

Accountability that keeps you moving forward

Every Monday you complete a check-in covering your training, nutrition, wins, obstacles, stress, energy, and performance. I review everything and adjust what needs adjusting. Send me a clip of any lift and I give you specific corrections. Every month we go deeper with a full consultation to assess where you are and set the focus for the next phase.

Weekly check-insMonthly consultationsLifting technique critiques
04

Your entire system in one place, driven by your own data

Your training, nutrition targets, check-in history, and direct line to me all live inside your coaching app. It connects with your wearables to pull real data on your sleep, training, stress, and nutrition. Every decision I make is based on what your body is actually doing, not assumptions.

Wearable integrationProgress trackingAll-in-one platform

No Guesswork

Here is exactly what happens when you sign up.

Intake
form Consultation
call Onboarding &assessment System
ready

01

Fill out the intake form

A detailed questionnaire covering your training history, nutrition, work, sleep, stress, and daily habits. This is what makes everything that follows actually built for you. Within 24 hours of submitting, you receive a personal confirmation from me and a link to book your 90-minute consultation call.

02

Your 90-minute consultation call

We sit together, review your form, and go deep into what has been working against you. I learn about your goals, understand where you are, and make sure we are the right fit for each other before anything begins. This is where the work starts.

03

Onboarding & Physical assessment

Once we confirm the fit, I onboard you into my coaching platform where your training, nutrition, check-ins, and direct line to me all live. I then assign your physical assessment covering body stats, movement screening, and work capacity. This gives me the complete picture I need to build your system.

04

Your complete system is ready

With the full picture in hand, your personalized training, nutrition, and habit optimization plan is built and live in your app. From here, we keep moving forward together toward your first milestone.

The body you want is on the other side of these four steps.

Start My Transformation

Your Coach

I know this works because I did it myself first. That is exactly why I know it will work for you.

Chapter 1

The Cost of Putting Yourself Last

I was a data analyst at a large energy company. High performer, hard worker, the person people counted on. But I was 30 lbs overweight, wearing bigger clothes to hide my body, and carrying a heaviness I just couldn’t shift no matter what I tried. The frustration wasn’t really about the weight. It was the gap between the person you know you are and the one you see in the mirror every morning. I kept telling myself I’d figure it out on my own. That asking for help wasn’t something I needed. It cost me years. If you’re here, you already know what I mean.

Chapter 2

The Mirror Moment

One night I was lying in bed in my studio apartment staring at the ceiling. Quiet. No distractions. Just me and the thoughts I’d been avoiding. I got up. Walked to the bathroom. Took off my shirt and looked at myself. Really looked. 30 lbs overweight. Disconnected from the person I knew I was inside. That was the moment I stopped making excuses about my health and made a decision. Not a new diet. Not a new training plan. Not another Monday. A real decision. My body was going to represent who I actually was. The standard I held everywhere else in my life. I wasn’t going to let this one thing keep costing me.

Chapter 3

The System That Changed Everything

I stopped looking for the next program and started building a system around my actual life. Audited what was really holding me back. Engineered a plan that fit my schedule, my habits, my goals and my body. Executed until it stopped feeling like effort and just became who I was. That process became the AEM Method. Now I train four times a week without negotiating with myself. Energy is high. Confidence is real. I eat the food I enjoy eating without guilt.

Credentials

  • NASM Certified Personal Trainer
  • Certified Nutrition Coach through Dr. Layne Norton’s evidence-based program
  • One year coaching in person at the Garage Gym, Round Rock TX, before taking things online
  • Co-founder, Yalla Stride, a social and wellness club in Austin TX built on movement and connection

The body you want cannot be bought with a quick fix or hacked into existence in eight weeks. I know that because I tried. What it actually requires is the right system, built around the life you already have, and a coach who stays in it with you when progress feels slow. Results take time. That is not a warning. That is just the truth the fitness industry has never been honest enough to tell you. But here is what they also never tell you. The person you become on the other side of this is completely different. The discipline carries. The confidence carries. The way you show up for everything else in your life changes. The body is just where it starts.

The Investment

Two Paths. One Standard of Excellence.

A single session with a qualified in-person personal trainer costs between $100 and $120. Train three times a week and you are looking at $1,200 to $1,400 a month, for sessions only. No nutrition coaching. No accountability between sessions. No system built around your actual life.

Gold

$79.99 / week

$10.67 / day · billed every 4 weeks

  • Training program built for your life
  • Custom nutrition blueprint — exact calorie and macro targets
  • Routine and habit coaching
  • Weekly check-ins
  • Monthly consultations
  • 4 lifting technique critiques per month
  • Mon–Fri coach access — response within 24 hours
Apply for Gold
Limited to 7 clients

Platinum

$199.99 / week

$26.67 / day · billed every 4 weeks

Everything in Gold, plus

  • Access to private video coaching calls
  • Mon–Sat priority coach access — same day response
  • Unlimited lifting technique critiques
  • Bonus: Full supplement protocol — what, when, and why
  • Bonus: Custom meal plans and grocery lists
Apply for Platinum

Gold works out to $10.67 a day. Platinum to $26.67 a day. The confidence to wear the clothes you like. The energy to show up fully. The body that finally matches who you are. That is what this is worth. The number on the card is just what it costs to get there.

30-Day Money Back Guarantee

Do the work for 30 days. Complete every weekly check-in. Complete your first month’s consultation. Log all of your training, your nutrition, and your habits. If after 30 days of doing all of that you are not completely satisfied with the coaching and the support you’re getting, you can ask for your money back and I’ll refund you no questions asked.

I’m not asking you to trust me blindly. I’m asking you to show up for 30 days and do the work. If you do and you’re not satisfied, you get your money back. If you do and it works, you’ll wish you started sooner.

After 30 days, cancel at any time with 30 days notice via email.

Frequently Asked Questions

FAQs

Some of my current clients came to me after working with other coaches and seeing no meaningful results. Their problem was never their effort or commitment. What they were getting was a generic plan, a check-in sheet if they were lucky, no real accountability, and maybe a text message with their workouts and a meal plan that had been handed to every other client. Nothing was based on real data. Nothing was built for their actual life. Nothing was built for their actual body. This starts with a 90-minute audit call where we go deep on everything. Training history, nutrition, sleep, stress, work, and daily patterns that are working against your goals. Everything that follows is built from that data. It is not a template. It is your system.

No. Your nutrition is built around food you actually like, including meals out, cultural food, and the things that make eating enjoyable. The goal is not to take things away. It is to show you how to eat in a way that gets results without making you miserable.

To put it in perspective, a qualified in-person personal trainer charges anywhere from $100 to $120 per session. Train three times a week and you are looking at $1,200 to $1,800 a month, for sessions only. No nutrition. No accountability between sessions. No system built around your life. The Gold plan works out to $10.67 a day. The Platinum plan works out to $26.67 a day. You have probably already spent more than that on memberships, supplements, and generic programs that did not stick. The real question is not what this costs. It is what another year of staying exactly where you are costs.

That is completely fair. But think about what exactly. If the hesitation is whether this will work, the answer is in the results of every client who came in skeptical and stayed because the system actually worked for them. If it is the investment, the daily breakdown is above. If it is timing, the right time has never been what changed things for anyone. What changed things was making a decision and having the right system in place to back it up. The only thing thinking about it has ever cost anyone is time.

That is exactly what the system is built for. Your training program works with whatever equipment you have access to, including a hotel gym or no gym at all. Your nutrition is built to flex around restaurants, airports, and unpredictable weeks. And if something throws you off, that is what the weekly check-ins are for. One busy week has never derailed a single client. The system accounts for real life because it is built around it.

Results vary from person to person depending on your starting point, how consistently you follow the plan, and your individual body. A sustainable rate of weight loss is 0.5 to 1 lb per week. That said, most clients see an average of 6 lbs lost in the first month alongside visible changes in strength and energy. Muscle building takes a bit longer and requires a different approach. Everything is done in phases to make sure results are sustainable and lasting. This is not a quick fix. Real change takes real time. We figure out exactly what it takes to get you the result and build the timeline around that.

All payments are processed securely through Stripe, which accepts all major credit and debit cards. Stripe supports a wide range of payment options beyond those shown on the page. Financing is also available through Affirm, allowing you to split the cost into manageable flexible payments.

Let’s face it, you’ve already tried the free stuff. You’ve already tried the cheap stuff. And every time, you ended up back at square one. Not because you quit. Because it was never built for you. This is different because it starts with understanding your life before anything else. That is why my method works.

Your discipline built everything else.

It’s time your body caught up.

The decision you make today determines who you see in the mirror a year from now.
